name: design-review
description: Unified design orchestrator (v2.2): preflight declares every component it uses + ASKS to install + skips EXPLICITLY (scripts/preflight.mjs); routes ALL design skills to their correct command/mode; accumulates suggestions, asks user (multi-select), applies chosen via owning fix command. Vitality telos: preflight → audit-first → reference-research (Dribbble + refero + ui-ux-pro-max vocab) → plan (frontend-design) → 4 core skills ROUTED → verdict (alive/templated/flat, reinforced by review-animations + huashu Playwright) → loop. Surface routing (landing/dashboard/non-web). Agents + /design-review command + PostToolUse gate hook.
